docs.title: Auto Workflow
docs.description: Auto Workflow automates the full order processing pipeline so you don't have to manually confirm, invoice, and ship each order.

docs.title: Order Configuration
docs.description: Configure how Shopify orders are imported and processed in Odoo.

docs.title: Payment Gateway
docs.description: Map Shopify payment gateways to Odoo accounting journals for correct financial recording.

docs.title: Product Configuration
docs.description: Configure how products sync between Shopify and Odoo.

docs.title: Stock Information
docs.description: Configure how inventory levels sync between Shopify locations and Odoo warehouses.

docs.title: Tax Configuration
docs.description: Map Shopify taxes to Odoo fiscal positions and tax rules.

docs.title: Webhook Configuration
docs.description: Webhooks enable real-time sync between Shopify and Odoo. When an event occurs in Shopify (new order, updated product, etc.), Shopify instantly notifies Odoo.

docs.title: Configure Instance
docs.description: After entering your Shopify credentials, configure the sync settings for your Odoo instance.

docs.title: Generate API Keys
docs.description: To connect Odoo with Shopify, you need to create a Custom App in Shopify and obtain API credentials.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.description: This guide walks you through the complete installation of the SDLC Corp Shopify–Odoo Connector.

docs.title: Setup Connector
docs.description: After installing the module, configure the Shopify store connection in Odoo.

docs.title: Welcome to SDLC Corp Docs
docs.description: Welcome to the official documentation for the SDLC Corp Shopify–Odoo Connector — enterprise-grade real-time integration between Shopify and Odoo ERP.

docs.title: Auto Scheduler
docs.description: The connector includes pre-configured scheduled actions for regular background sync.

docs.title: Import Customers
docs.description: Sync your Shopify customers into Odoo contacts.

docs.title: Import Locations
docs.description: Import your Shopify fulfilment locations into Odoo for warehouse mapping.

docs.title: Queue Management
docs.description: The connector uses an async queue system for reliable, retryable processing of all sync operations.

docs.title: Cancel Order in Shopify
docs.description: Cancel a Shopify order from within Odoo.

docs.title: Export Shipment Tracking
docs.description: Push tracking numbers from Odoo delivery orders back to Shopify to mark orders as fulfilled.

docs.title: Grant Fulfillment Access
docs.description: Grant shipping access to allow the connector to export tracking numbers back to Shopify.

docs.title: Import Cancel Orders
docs.description: Sync cancelled orders from Shopify to Odoo.

docs.title: Import Returns
docs.description: Import product returns from Shopify into Odoo as return transfers.

docs.title: Import Shipped Orders
docs.description: Import already-fulfilled orders from Shopify — useful for historical imports or catch-up syncs.

docs.title: Import Specific Order
docs.description: Import a single order by its Shopify Order ID.

docs.title: Import Unshipped Orders
docs.description: Import all open, unpaid or unshipped orders from Shopify.

docs.title: Process Refunds
docs.description: Process full or partial refunds for Shopify orders.

docs.title: Export Stock to Shopify
docs.description: Push current Odoo inventory levels to Shopify.

docs.title: Import Products
docs.description: Import all products from your Shopify store into Odoo.

docs.title: Import Specific Products
docs.description: Import one or more specific products by their Shopify Product ID.

docs.title: Import Stock from Shopify
docs.description: Pull inventory levels from Shopify into Odoo.

docs.title: Map Products
docs.description: Link existing Odoo products to their Shopify equivalents without re-importing.

docs.title: Update Products
docs.description: Push product changes from Odoo back to Shopify.

docs.description: Does the connector work with Shopify Plus?

docs.description: Common Issues

docs.title: Net Profit Report
docs.description: Analyze profitability of your Shopify sales directly in Odoo.

docs.title: Sales Report
docs.description: View consolidated sales data from your Shopify stores directly in Odoo.

docs.title: Shopify Payouts
docs.description: Import Shopify Payments payout data into Odoo for reconciliation.

docs.title: Webhook Logs & Activity
docs.description: Monitor incoming webhook events from Shopify in real time.
